query: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM executions WHERE status IN ('PENDING', 'RUNNING')) as runningExecutions, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM invites WHERE invite_status = 'PENDING') as pendingInvites, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM probes WHERE status = 'OFFLINE' OR (status = 'ONLINE' AND (lastSeenAt IS NULL OR TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, lastSeenAt, NOW()) > 300))) as redProbes FROM (SELECT 1) AS _dummy;
